summary: Employee Dossier feature fully tested. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - worker picker, dossier header, summary cards, 4 inner tabs (Reports, Payroll, Calendar, Advances). No regression on other tabs (Всички отчети, Седмица, Заплати).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing worker Светлин Антонов (6f69367a-e25f-489d-a7c8-f25cde6a9ac5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Dossier feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/employee-dossier/{worker_id} returns header, reports, payroll, advances, calendar, warnings, period. 2) Header includes: name, position, pay_type, hourly_rate (calculated), avatar_url, is_active, phone. 3) Reports section has flat report lines with date, project (clickable), smr, hours, normal, overtime, value, status, payroll_status. 4) Payroll section has weekly history with gross/bonuses/deductions/net/status badges (Платен/В пакет). 5) Calendar section has daily entries with status/hours/has_report/overtime. 6) Advances section lists all advances/loans with amount/remaining/status. 7) Frontend: Reports page has 4 tabs (Всички отчети, Седмица, Заплати, Досие). 8) Dossier tab shows worker picker with search and avatar cards. 9) Clicking worker card opens dossier with header + summary + inner tabs (Отчети, Заплати, Календар, Заеми). 10) All data-testids working: tab-dossier, dossier-worker-list, dossier-search, worker-cards, worker-card-{id}, employee-dossier, dossier-back, dossier-header, dossier-summary, dossier-tabs, dossier-tab-{id}, dossier-reports, dossier-payroll, dossier-calendar, dossier-advances.

backend_apis: header: id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, role, avatar_url, is_active, position, pay_type, hourly_rate, monthly_salary, start_date
reports: lines array with id, date, project_id, project_name, smr, hours, normal, overtime, value, status, payroll_status + totals
payroll: weeks array with batch_id, week_start, week_end, status, paid_at, days, hours, normal, overtime, gross, bonuses, deductions, net, adjustments + totals
advances: array with id, type, amount, remaining, status, date, note
calendar: array with date, weekday, status, hours, has_report, overtime, site_id, site_name
warnings: array with type, text (unpaid weeks, active loans, missing rate, no payroll status)
Custom date range parameters work correctly
Invalid worker ID returns error object
frontend_ui: Reports page has 4 tabs: Всички отчети, Седмица, Заплати, Досие
Dossier tab shows worker picker with search input and avatar cards
Worker cards show avatar, name, position with chevron
Search filters workers by name or position
Clicking worker card opens dossier view
Dossier header shows avatar, name, position, phone, pay type, hourly rate, active status badge
Summary cards show: total hours, total value (EUR), total paid (EUR), report count
Inner tabs: Отчети, Заплати, Календар, Заеми
Reports tab shows table with date, project (clickable link), SMR, hours, overtime, value, status badge, payroll status badge
Payroll tab shows weekly history with week range, days, hours, gross, bonuses, deductions, net, status badge + totals row
Calendar tab shows daily entries with date, weekday, status icon, hours, overtime badge, has_report checkmark, site link
Advances tab shows table with type, date, amount, remaining, status badge, note
Back button returns to worker list
No regression on Всички отчети tab - reports table working
No regression on Седмица tab - weekly matrix working
No regression on Заплати tab - payroll batch section working
